_comment: Project starter templates. Each entry maps an LLM/user-facing id to a JSON project document. project.template.list returns this list; project.template.apply{templateId} loads the body.

templates.title: Blank project
templates.description: Empty project with one default UART source. Useful as a starting point when the user wants to build from scratch.

templates.title: IMU over UART
templates.description: Single UART source with a 9-DOF IMU group: accelerometer (X/Y/Z), gyroscope (X/Y/Z), magnetometer (X/Y/Z). Comma-separated frame parser. Plots + accelerometer 3-axis widget.

templates.title: GPS over UART (NMEA 0183)
templates.description: UART source for GPS receivers that output NMEA 0183 sentences. Latitude, longitude, altitude, satellites, HDOP, fix quality.

templates.title: Multi-channel scope (UART)
templates.description: 8 numeric channels over UART, comma-separated. Each rendered as plot + gauge. Suitable for ADC streams, sensor arrays, oscilloscope-like dashboards.

templates.title: Network telemetry (UDP)
templates.description: CSV frame parser with 5 generic telemetry channels: timestamp, value1, value2, value3, value4. Configure the UDP listener via io.network.* after applying; edit the parser/datasets as needed.

templates.title: MQTT subscriber (Pro)
templates.description: MQTT-driven project (subscriber mode). Configure the broker and topic via the mqtt.* commands after applying. Includes a single placeholder group with one numeric dataset.
